phase_status.phase_1_verify_claims: PASS (47/47 shared tests; 4 new CE-path tests; CE timer leak fixed)
phase_status.phase_2_classification: PASS (0.7/0.3 unvalidated blend removed; CE-only default; configurable RERANKER_CE_WEIGHT/DET_WEIGHT for A/B)

cross_encoder_reranker_status: NOT_DEPLOYED (service code present at services/legal-reranker; 0.7/0.3 blend hardcoding removed; CE-only safe default)

operator_action_required.variable_name: run the remaining read-only queries in rag_idealization/01_PHASE5_DB_COVERAGE.md (no new credentials)
operator_action_required.where_to_configure: same read-only DSN already in use
operator_action_required.resume_phase: PHASE_5_COMPLETION (active_missing_embeddings, zero_vector, vector_dims, breakdowns, data-quality counts) then PHASE_4 (Metric embedding endpoint URL+key) then PHASE_7/9/10/11

final_result: OPERATOR_ACTION_REQUIRED: run the remaining Phase 5 read-only queries (01_PHASE5_DB_COVERAGE.md) with the already-granted read-only DSN to confirm ACTIVE_MISSING_EMBEDDINGS=0, actual wrong-dimension=0, zero-vector=0, and the breakdown/data-quality counts; then provide the Metric embedding endpoint URL+key for Phase 4. Iteration 3 advanced Phase 2 (removed unvalidated 0.7/0.3 blend, CE-only safe default, CE timer leak fixed, 4 new CE tests).

iteration_3_changes.root_cause: Phase 2 defect: cross-encoder hook hardcoded an unvalidated 0.7*CE + 0.3*DET blend (a hypothesis, not an A/B-approved constant), and the CE path was not exercised by any test. Secondary: tryCrossEncoder leaked its 5s abort timer when fetch rejected because clearTimeout was only on the success path.
iteration_3_changes.fix: Default blend is now CE-only (ce_weight=1, det_weight=0) with deterministic score as a stable tiebreak only; RERANKER_CE_WEIGHT/RERANKER_DET_WEIGHT (clamped, normalized) allow benchmarking alternatives once the A/B harness is live; blend recorded in RerankMetadata.ce_blend; timer cleared in finally.
iteration_3_changes.tests: deno test legal-reranker.test.ts + semantic-status.test.ts = 47/47 PASS (added 4 CE-path tests: CE-success reorder, unreachable fail-closed, bad-shape fail-closed, configurable blend normalization). deno check clean on vector-search, legal-chat, embed-query, rag-search, legal-reranker, semantic-status.
iteration_3_changes.commit: 56e0d8c reranker: replace unvalidated 0.7/0.3 CE blend with CE-only default; fix CE timer leak
